programme.desc: Action from the 42nd edition of the Tro Bro Leon. This gruelling 202km race starts and finishes in Lannilis, France, and sends riders over punishing unpaved dirt and farm tracks.

programme.desc: Action from the final round of the seventh LIV Golf event of the year, taking place at the Trump National Golf Club in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: LIV Golf League

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: Action from LIV Golf as some of the world's best golfers compete for glory.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1996/97 UEFA Champions League final between Borussia Dortmund and Juventus in Munich. Armed with an expensively assembled squad, Juve were overwhelming favourites.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programme.desc: Real Madrid went in search of their seventh European Cup title when they faced Juventus in the 1998 final in Amsterdam. The Serie A winners featured a 25-year-old Zinedine Zidane.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, starred for Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the dramatic 2000/01 UEFA Champions League final between Bayern Munich and Valencia at the San Siro in Milan. Bayern were chasing their first title in a quarter-century.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programme.sub-title: 2002 Final: Real Madrid v Bayer 04 Leverkusen
programme.desc: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programme.sub-title: 2004 Final: AS Monaco v FC Porto
programme.desc: A look back at the 2004 final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Porto were led by Jose Mourinho, who would leave the club to take over at Chelsea two days after the final.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2011/12 UEFA Champions League final between Bayern Munich and Chelsea at the Allianz Arena. This was Chelsea's second final, having lost their last in 2008.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: Action from LIV Golf as some of the world's best golfers compete for glory.

programme.desc: Action from the Gallagher PREM.

programme.desc: Highlights from the third and final stage on Bulgarian soil as the peloton takes on a largely flat 175km route from the ancient city of Plovdiv to the capital, Sofia.

programme.title: UCI Gravel World Series
programme.desc: Action from the UCI Gravel World Series.

programme.title: Serie A Football
programme.desc: Football from Italy's top division.

programme.title: The Ultimate Fighting Championship
programme.sub-title: UFC Fight Night: Jack Della Maddalena v Carlos Prates
programme.desc: UFC Fight heads to the RAC Arena in Perth, Australia, with a huge card headlined by the welterweight showdown between Carlos Prates and home favourite Jack Della Maddalena.

programme.title: UFC Countdown
programme.desc: We look ahead to UFC 328 at the Prudential Centre in Newark, which features the middleweight title fight between Khamzat Chimaev and Sean Strickland.

programme.title: Live: World Climbing Series
programme.desc: Action from the men's and women's lead semi-final at the IFSC Climbing World Series in Wujiang, China.

programme.title: WRC: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Champion Thierry Neuville faces crisis while new Hyundai signee Adrien Fourmaux delivers a stunning performance, setting the stage for Gregoire Munster's emotional comeback.

programme.title: Live: FIA World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Action from special stage 11 of the 2026 World Rally Championship in Portugal.

programme.title: Live: FIA World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Action from special stage 11 of the 2026 World Rally Championship in Portugal.

programme.title: No Filter Football
programme.sub-title: UEFA Europa League Semi-Final, 2nd Leg: Aston Villa v Nottingham Forest
programme.desc: Our No Filter cameras go behind the scenes of the colossal UEFA Europa League semi-leg clash between Aston Villa and Nottingham Forest at Villa Park.

programme.title: Live: FIA World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Action from special stages 12 and 13 of the 2026 World Rally Championship in Portugal.

programme.title: Sign Up: Into Football
programme.desc: Fulham Special, featuring head coach Marco Silva and captain Tom Cairney. Glenn Hoddle on the Premier League, FA Cup and World Cup. Plus, England Deaf Women win the Futsal Euros!

programme.title: Endurance Uncovered: Racing for Excellence
programme.desc: A special look at the World Endurance Championship, a global series of races that test the limits of both drivers and vehicles.

programme.title: Live: La Vuelta Femenina
programme.desc: Women's cycling action from stage seven of the 2026 Vuelta a España. This 'Queen Stage' features the historic first-ever women's competitive ascent of the Alto de L'Angliru.

programme.title: Live: La Vuelta Femenina
programme.desc: Women's cycling action from stage seven of the 2026 Vuelta a España. This 'Queen Stage' features the historic first-ever women's competitive ascent of the Alto de L'Angliru.

programme.desc: Race action from the 6 Hours of Spa-Francorchamps, part of the 2026 FIA World Endurance Championship.
